examples: I've been groping in the dark in a number of years.
Groping with his hands in the dark along the wall, the blind man finds his way to the door.
Instantly Tom answered it, and leading Becky by the hand, started groping down the corridor in its direction.
EU's groping into the defence field will nevertheless make a difference, in the worst possible way.
Because any time the slightest whiff of boredom sets in, the kids start robotically groping for it.
